creator: jamie@catflap.org
text:
Really sorry. I'm not sure how I made that mistake. Brain fart time.

I'll have a closer look at the port, and either take it over, or find an alternative.

Either way, I'll submit a PR for the port with an update of some sort.

As this is a miscategorised report, shall I raise a new PR or reply here?

If you want, close this PR, and I'll act accordingly.

Apologies again for the noise.
